sections.planetterrian_spotlight:
### Planetterrian Spotlight
The shingles vaccine’s potential to slow biological aging, as reported in Science Daily, is a surprising twist on a familiar shot. Beyond preventing painful rashes, it appears to dial down chronic inflammation—a key driver of age-related issues like heart disease and frailty—in over 3,800 older Americans studied.
